# isEnabled

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that determines whether the session is enabled.

## Declaration

```swift
var isEnabled: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false]. Disabled sessions don’t appear on the network and can’t initiate or receive connections.

## Configuring a Session

- **default()**: Returns the default singleton session.
- **connectionPolicy**: The policy that determines who can connect to this session.

items.description: The policy that determines who can connect to this session.
